en: Hello, I'm Jimmy Carr, and I'm announcing a new tour.
ko: 안녕하세요, 저는 지미 카입니다, 새로운 투어를 발표합니다.

en: It's called Jimmy Carr Laughs Funny.
Because there'll be laughs, and it'll be funny,
And if you're like me, it's the kind of thing you like.
ko: 저랑 비슷하다면, 이런 걸 좋아할 거예요.

en: I think jokes are like magnets.
and a million of you came to see me on my last tour.
Thanks very much, by the way.
But like magnets, jokes attract and they repel.
ko: 하지만 자석처럼 농담은 끌어당기기도 하고 밀어내기도 하죠.

en: Some people are repelled by my sense of humor.
ko: 제 유머 감각에 거부감을 느끼는 사람도 있어요.

en: If that's you, don't come and see me live.
ko: 그게 당신이라면, 라이브 보러 오지 마세요.

en: But if you like this kind of thing,
come and see Jimmy Carr Laughs Funny.
ko: 지미 카의 웃음 코미디를 보러 오세요.

en: I'll be, well, I'll be everywhere.
